questions.content: Ni dalili kuu ya shambulio la moyo?
questions.explanation: Maumivu ya kifua, shinikizo au kubanwa kifuani ni dalili kuu za shambulio la moyo.

questions.content: 'A' katika mtihani wa FAST inamaanisha nini?
questions.explanation: 'A' inamaanisha Arm (Mkono). Angalia kama mkono mmoja unashindwa kunyanyuka.

questions.content: Unapaswa kufanya nini ukiona dalili za kiharusi?
questions.explanation: Ikiwa dalili za kiharusi zipo, piga simu ya dharura mara moja bila kuchelewa.

questions.content: Kwa nini usimpe mgonjwa chakula au kinywaji?
questions.explanation: Mgonjwa anaweza kushindwa kumeza vizuri na hivyo kusababisha vifusi vya kuingia mapafuni.

questions.content: Kwa nini muda ni muhimu katika tiba ya kiharusi?
questions.explanation: Mamilioni ya seli za ubongo hufa kila dakika bila matibabu, hivyo Time is Brain.

questions.content: Sumukuvu wa chakula husababishwa na nini?
questions.explanation: Sumukuvu wa chakula hutokana na chakula kilichoharibika, chenye bakteria au kemikali.

questions.content: Unapaswa kufanya nini ikiwa kemikali imegusa ngozi?
questions.explanation: Ikiwa kemikali imegusa ngozi, osha kwa maji mengi safi kwa dakika 15-20.

questions.content: Ni kitu gani cha kuepuka wakati wa kutoa huduma ya kwanza kwa sumukuvu?
questions.explanation: Usimlazimishe mgonjwa kutapika kwani kemikali zinaweza kuharibu koo mara ya pili.

questions.content: Ni dalili gani hatari ya sumukuvu inayohitaji msaada wa haraka?
questions.explanation: Kupoteza fahamu ni dalili ya dharura inayohitaji hospitali mara moja.

questions.content: Mgonjwa anapaswa kupelekwa hospitali mara moja ikiwa?
questions.explanation: Mpeleke hospitali mara moja ikiwa mgonjwa ameza dawa nyingi au kemikali.

questions.content: Unapaswa kufanya nini mtu akiungua na moto?
questions.explanation: Mwagia maji baridi kwa dakika 10-20 ili kupunguza joto na maumivu.

questions.content: Ni kitu gani cha kuepuka endapo mtu ataumwa na nyoka?
questions.explanation: Usinyonye sumu wala ukate jeraha, badala yake mpeleke hospitali haraka.

questions.content: Ni hatua gani sahihi ya kumsaidia mtu mwenye kuvunjika mfupa?
questions.explanation: Tumia splint au kitu kigumu kusaidia kiungo na usijaribu kurudisha mfupa.

questions.content: Hatua ya kwanza kabla ya kumsaidia mtu aliyepigwa na umeme ni nini?
questions.explanation: Lazima uweke umeme wazi kwanza kabla ya kugusa mgonjwa ili kuepuka hatari.

questions.content: Kipi kati ya hivi kinaweza kusababisha mtu kuanguka nyumbani?
questions.explanation: Sakafu zenye maji, vitu kutapakaa, na mwanga hafifu husababisha kuanguka.

questions.content: Ni kigezo kipi hupimia ukweli na usahihi wa taarifa?
questions.explanation: Accuracy inapima ukweli na usahihi wa data iliyotolewa.

questions.content: Operator gani ya Boolean hutumika kupata matokeo yote yanayohusiana na maneno mawili?
questions.explanation: Operator ya OR inaruhusu matokeo yote yaliyo na neno la kwanza au la pili.

questions.content: Ni zana gani inayotumika kudhibiti nakala na citations?
questions.explanation: Zotero na Mendeley ni zana maarufu za kusaidia utunzaji wa marejeleo.

questions.content: Kutumia kazi ya mtu bila idhini na kumtaja ni nini?
questions.explanation: Plagiarism ni wizi wa mawazo au kazi za watu wengine bila kutaja chanzo.

questions.content: Chanzo cha taarifa cha kwanza kama ripoti ya utafiti ni kipi?
questions.explanation: Vyanzo vya msingi ni ushahidi wa moja kwa moja kama ripoti za utafiti.

questions.content: Maana ya Information Filtering ni nini?
questions.explanation: Ni mchakato wa kutambua, kuchagua na kutumia taarifa sahihi huku ukiondoa zisizo sahihi.

choices.content: Kutambua na kuchagua taarifa sahihi na muhimu

questions.content: Moja ya umuhimu wa kuchuja taarifa ni nini?
questions.explanation: Kuchuja taarifa husaidia kupunguza upotevu wa muda kwa kusoma taarifa zisizo muhimu.

questions.content: Information overload ni nini?
questions.explanation: Ni hali ambapo mtu hupokea taarifa nyingi kuliko uwezo wake wa kuzichakata ipasavyo.

choices.content: Hali ya kupokea taarifa nyingi zaidi ya uwezo wa kuzichakata
Hali ya kusoma vitabu vya kuchapishwa

questions.content: Mfano wa Taarifa za Kuchapishwa ni upi?
questions.explanation: Taarifa za kuchapishwa ni pamoja na vitabu, magazeti, journals na ripoti zilizochapishwa.

questions.content: Sifa moja ya Taarifa za Kidijitali ni nini?
questions.explanation: Taarifa za kidijitali hupatikana kwa haraka na husasishwa mara kwa mara.

choices.content: Hupatikana kwa urahisi na kusasishwa haraka

quizzes.description: AI-generated assessment based on this module's content. Score 70% or higher to unlock the next module.

questions.content: Chanzo cha msingi kinafafanua vipi?
questions.explanation: Vyanzo vya msingi vinatoa taarifa halisi na za awali bila tafsiri, kama vile ripoti za utafiti.

choices.content: Hutoa taarifa za awali na za moja kwa moja

questions.content: Kati ya hizi, ni ipi mfano wa chanzo cha tertiari?
questions.explanation: Vyanzo vya tertiari hutoa muhtasari au mkusanyiko wa taarifa, kama vile kamusi na encyclopedia.

questions.content: Ni sifa gani kuu ya vyanzo rasmi?
questions.explanation: Vyanzo rasmi vinatambuliwa kisheria au kitaaluma na hupitia uhakiki, kama vile ripoti za serikali.

questions.content: Database ni nini katika muktadha wa taarifa?
questions.explanation: Database ni mifumo ya kidijitali inayohifadhi makala, vitabu na tafiti za kitaaluma kama Google Scholar.

questions.content: Uhalisia katika uchambuzi wa taarifa maana yake ni nini?
questions.explanation: Uhalisia unahusu kama taarifa ni mpya au ya hivi karibuni na inafaa kwa matumizi ya sasa.

choices.content: Taarifa ni ya kweli na sahihi

questions.content: Tathmini ya ubora wa taarifa ni mchakato wa gani?
questions.explanation: Ni mchakato wa kuchunguza na kupima uhalali, usahihi, uaminifu na umuhimu wa taarifa kabla ya kuitumia.

choices.content: Kuchunguza na kupima uhalali na usahihi wa taarifa.
Kuandika taarifa mpya kwa ajili ya watu wengine.
Kusambaza taarifa kwenye mitandao ya kijamii.
Kufuta taarifa zisizo sahihi kwenye kompyuta.

questions.content: Chanzo cha taarifa kina 'Authority' kama kina sifa gani?
questions.explanation: Authority inahusisha utaalamu na uhalali wa mwandishi au chanzo cha taarifa.

choices.content: Kina vichwa vya habari vya kushangaza.
Kina utaalamu na uhalali wa mwandishi au chanzo.

questions.content: Tofauti kuu kati ya Disinformation na Misinformation ni nini?
questions.explanation: Disinformation hutolewa kwa makusudi ili kudanganya, huku Misinformation hutolewa bila nia ya kudhuru.

choices.content: Disinformation ni kwa makusudi, Misinformation bila nia ya kudhuru.
Misinformation ni kwa makusudi, Disinformation bila nia ya kudhuru.
Zote mbili ni za kisiasa tu.

questions.content: Ni sifa gani mojawapo ya Fake News?
questions.explanation: Fake news huwa na vichwa vya habari vya kushangaza, kukosa chanzo cha kuaminika na lugha ya kuchochea hisia.

choices.content: Kuwa na marejeo mengi ya kitaaluma.
Kutumika na taasisi za serikali tu.
Kuwa na vichwa vya habari vya kushangaza.

questions.content: Bias katika taarifa ina maana gani?
questions.explanation: Bias ni upendeleo au mtazamo wa upande mmoja unaoathiri namna taarifa inavyowasilishwa.

choices.content: Kuwa sahihi kabisa na ya kweli.
Upendeleo au mtazamo wa upande mmoja.
Kuwa na umuhimu kwa watumiaji wote.

choices.content: Njia ya kutafuta na kuchagua taarifa muhimu
Njia ya kuandika taarifa kwenye vitabu

questions.content: Filters ni zana zinazotumika kufanya nini?

questions.content: Usimamizi mzuri wa taarifa husaidia kufanya nini kati ya yafuatayo?
questions.explanation: Kulingana na sehemu ya 6.1, usimamizi mzuri wa taarifa husaidia kuokoa muda, kupunguza kupotea kwa taarifa, kuboresha maamuzi, na kuongeza ufanisi wa kazi na utafiti.

questions.content: Kati ya zifuatazo, ipi ni mfano wa 'Physical storage'?
questions.explanation: Makabati (cabinets) ni mfano wa Physical storage, wakala Google Drive, Kompyuta, na OneDrive ni mifano ya Digital storage.

questions.content: Chombo kama vile Zotero, Mendeley, na EndNote huitwa nini?
questions.explanation: Zotero, Mendeley, na EndNote ni mifano ya Citation Tools ambazo ni programu zinazosaidia kuhifadhi, kupanga na kurejelea vyanzo vya taarifa kiotomatiki.

questions.content: Maelezo kama vile Mwandishi, Tarehe, Chanzo, na Aina ya data hujulikana kama nini?
questions.explanation: Metadata ni maelezo ya data, na mifano yake ni pamoja na Mwandishi, Tarehe, Chanzo, na Aina ya data.

questions.content: Aina gani ya maarifa inajulikana kama 'maarifa ya uzoefu binafsi'?
questions.explanation: Tacit knowledge ni maarifa ya uzoefu binafsi, tofauti na Explicit knowledge ambayo ni maarifa yaliyoandikwa au kurekodiwa.

choices.content: Gaming should be the first priority of the day to ensure maximum practice time.
Gaming is a reward to be enjoyed after completing responsibilities like study or work.
Gaming should replace physical exercise to save time for more gameplay.
Gaming is a stress-inducing activity that must be completed as quickly as possible.

questions.content: Which of the following correctly describes the '20-20-20 Rule' for eye health mentioned in the module?
questions.explanation: The module defines the 20-20-20 Rule as: 'Kila dakika 20: Tazama kitu kilicho mbali kwa sekunde 20' (Every 20 minutes: Look at something far away for 20 seconds).

choices.content: Play for 20 minutes, rest for 20 seconds, and drink 20ml of water.
Every 20 minutes, look at something far away for 20 seconds.
Take a 20-minute break after every 20 hours of gaming.
Stretch your wrists for 20 seconds every 20 minutes while looking at the screen.

questions.content: What distinguishes a 'Career / Esports' approach to gaming from playing for 'Burudani' (Entertainment) according to the module?
questions.explanation: Under the Career / Esports section, the module lists specific actions such as recording gameplay, streaming online (YouTube/Twitch), joining tournaments, and networking with other gamers.

choices.content: Playing strictly for fun and enjoying the story without recording.
Limiting playtime to 1-2 hours a day to avoid fatigue.
Recording gameplay, streaming online, and joining tournaments.
Focusing solely on single-player games to avoid social pressure.

questions.content: Based on the 'Balance muhimu' (Important Balance) section, what is the recommended order of activities?
questions.explanation: The module advises: 'Study / kazi kwanza' (Study/work first) and 'Gaming baada ya responsibilities' (Gaming after responsibilities).

choices.content: Gaming first, then exercise, followed by study or work.
Exercise first, then gaming, and finally study or work.
Study or work first, then gaming after responsibilities.
Gaming and study simultaneously to maximize efficiency.

questions.content: Which statement reflects the 'Mindset ya Pro Gamer' (Pro Gamer Mindset) taught in the module?
questions.explanation: The module states: 'Pro gamers hawachezi nonstop—wana routine' (Pro gamers don't play non-stop—they have a routine) and 'Breaks ni sehemu ya improvement' (Breaks are part of improvement).

choices.content: Pro gamers play non-stop without stopping to practice as much as possible.
Breaks are a sign of weakness and should be minimized to improve faster.
Gaming is primarily a source of stress that requires strict isolation.
Pro gamers follow a routine and understand that breaks are part of improvement.

questions.explanation: Neno 'Bonjour' linamaanisha 'Habari?' na hutumika kwa ajili ya salamu.

questions.explanation: Kulingana na somo, herufi 'H' haionyeshi sauti (silent).

questions.explanation: 'Je suis' ni kitenzi cha kuwa (être) kwa nafsi ya kwanza ya umoja, maana yake 'Mimi ni'.

questions.explanation: 'Mimi nina' inatafsiriwa kama 'J'ai' kutoka kitenzi 'avoir' (kuwa na).

questions.explanation: ROI huhesabwa kwa (Faida / Gharama) x 100. Hivyo (20M / 100M) x 100 ni sawa na 20%.

questions.content: Ikiwa mapato ni 1.2M na gharama zote ni 700K, Cash flow ni kiasi gani?

questions.content: Mbinu ipi ya tathmini ya mali inafaa zaidi kwa nyumba za makazi na viwanja?
questions.explanation: Kulingana na muhtasari wa moduli, mbinu ya Comparative (Market Comparison) ndiyo inayofaa kwa Nyumba za makazi na viwanja kwa sababu inalinganisha mali na mali zinazofanana zilizouzwa karibuni.

questions.content: Ikiwa Net Operating Income (NOI) ni TSh 15M na Cap Rate ya soko ni 8%, thamani ya mali ni kiasi gani?
questions.explanation: Kwa kutumia Income Method: Value = Net Operating Income ÷ Cap Rate. Hivyo, 15 ÷ 0.08 = 187.5M.

questions.content: Katika tathmini ya mikopo (Bank Valuation), benki mara nyingi hutumia thamani ya aina gani ambayo huwa chini ya thamani ya soko (Market Value)?
questions.explanation: Benki hutumia Forced Sale Value ambayo ni bei ya haraka ikiwa mali itauzwa kwa muda mfupi, na kwa kawaida ni takriban 75%-90% ya Market Value.

questions.content: Mbinu ya Cost Method (Cost Approach) inahesabu thamani ya mali kwa kutumia formula ipi?
questions.explanation: Cost Method inapima thamani kulingana na gharama ya kujenga upya pamoja na thamani ya ardhi, kisha ukitoa uchakavu: Value = (Cost ya kujenga upya - Depreciation) + Thamani ya Ardhi.

choices.content: Bei ya mauzo ya mali zinazofanana
(Cost ya kujenga upya - Depreciation) + Thamani ya Ardhi
Mapato ya mwaka ÷ Thamani ya mali

questions.explanation: Moduli inaeleza kuwa thamani ya ardhi mara nyingi HAIJUMUISHWI katika mahesabu ya bima, bali hulipa kwa viwango vya Replacement Cost.

quizzes.title: 🧠 MODULE 7: USHUGHULIKIAJI WA KIHISIA NA AFYA YA AKILI Mastery Check
quizzes.description: AI-generated assessment based on this module's content. Score 70% or higher to unlock the next module.

questions.content: Afya ya akili ina maana gani kulingana na moduli hii?
questions.explanation: Kulingana na moduli, afya ya akili ni hali ya ustawi wa kifikra, kihisia, na kijamii inayomuwezesha mtu kuishi vizuri na kufanya maamuzi sahihi.

choices.content: Hali ya ustawi wa kifikra, kihisia, na kijamii inayomuwezesha mtu kuishi vizuri.
Hali ya kukosa usingizi na kuwa na mawazo hasi tu.
Uwezo wa kufanya kazi bila kupumzika.

questions.content: Kati ya yafuatayo, ni nini kimoja kati ya sababu za msongo wa mawazo (stress)?
questions.explanation: Moduli inataja sababu za msongo wa mawazo ni pamoja na shule au kazi nyingi, matatizo ya kifedha, na migogoro ya kijamii.

questions.content: Dalili gani inayohusiana na Depression (Huzuni) kulingana na moduli?
questions.explanation: Kulingana na moduli, Depression inaonyeshwa na huzuni ya muda mrefu na kukosa hamu ya maisha, huku Anxiety ni wasiwasi wa kupita kiasi.

choices.content: Wasiwasi wa kupita kiasi na hofu bila sababu.
Huzuni ya muda mrefu na kukosa hamu ya maisha.

questions.content: Ni mbinu gani ya kudhibiti hisia (coping mechanism) inayopendekezwa?
questions.explanation: Moduli inataja mbinu muhimu za kudhibiti hisia ni pamoja na kupumua kwa utulivu, mazoezi ya mwili, kuandika hisia, na kuongea na rafiki.

questions.content: Moja ya faida za ushauri wa kisaikolojia (counseling) ni nini?
questions.explanation: Moduli inaeleza faida za ushauri ni pamoja na kupunguza stress, kuongeza self-awareness, na kuboresha maamuzi na maisha.

quizzes.course_title: Kozi ya Saikolojia (Psychology) – Kiswahili
quizzes.title: 🧠 MODULE 8: NEUROPSIKOLOJIA (NEUROPSYCHOLOGY) Mastery Check
quizzes.description: AI-generated assessment based on this module's content. Score 70% or higher to unlock the next module.

questions.content: Neuropsikolojia ni sehemu ya saikolojia inayochunguza nini?
questions.explanation: Neuropsikolojia ni tawi la saikolojia linalochunguza uhusiano kati ya ubongo, hisia, mawazo na tabia.

choices.content: Uhusiano kati ya ubongo, hisia, mawazo na tabia
Uhusiano kati ya moyo na mishipa ya damu

questions.content: Sehemu (lobe) ya ubongo inayohusika na maamuzi, mipango, hisia na uongozi ni ipi?
questions.explanation: Frontal Lobe ndiyo inayoshughulikia maamuzi, mipango, hisia na uongozi.

questions.content: Kazi kuu ya Occipital Lobe ni nini?
questions.explanation: Occipital Lobe inahusika moja kwa moja na uonao na picha.

questions.content: Neurotransmitter ipi inahusishwa na furaha, motisha na tuzo (reward)?
questions.explanation: Dopamine ni neurotransmitter inayohusishwa na furaha, motisha na hisia ya tuzo.

questions.content: Upungufu wa Serotonin mwilini unaweza kusababisha nini?
questions.explanation: Kulingana na module, upungufu wa Serotonin unaweza kusababisha huzuni.

quizzes.title: Sehemu ya 10: Maisha ya Kila Siku na Saikolojia Mastery Check
quizzes.description: AI-generated assessment based on this module's content. Score 70% or higher to unlock the next module.

questions.content: Ni mbinu gani ya saikolojia inayosaidia kuwahamasisha wafanyakazi kufanya vizuri kazini?
questions.explanation: Positive reinforcement husaidia kuwahamasisha wafanyakazi kufanya vizuri kulingana na somo la Saikolojia katika Uongozi na Kazini.

questions.content: Mwanafunzi wa 'visual learner' hutumia nini kuelewa vizuri zaidi?
questions.explanation: Mwanafunzi wa visual learner hutumia michoro kuelewa vizuri zaidi kulingana na mbinu za kujifunza.

questions.content: Ni mbinu gani ya saikolojia inayosaidia kuelewa hisia za watu wengine katika mahusiano?
questions.explanation: Empathy ni uwezo wa kuhisi hisia za wengine na husaidia kuboresha mahusiano ya kijamii na familia.

questions.content: Ni kitu gani kinachosaidia mtu kuona maendeleo yake ya kihisia kulingana na mbinu za kujitambua?
questions.explanation: Kuandika diary kila siku husaidia kuona maendeleo yako ya kihisia na kujitathmini.

questions.content: Moja ya mbinu za kila siku za kutumia saikolojia ni 'Emotional regulation'. Ni mfano gani wa hili?
questions.explanation: Emotional regulation inahusisha mbinu kama vile kupumua na kutulia ili kudhibiti hisia.

quizzes.module_title: Moduli 2: Aina za Mahitaji Maalum (Types of Special Needs)
quizzes.title: Moduli 2: Aina za Mahitaji Maalum (Types of Special Needs) Mastery Check
quizzes.description: AI-generated assessment based on this module's content. Score 70% or higher to unlock the next module.

questions.content: Ni mbinu gani ya kufundishia inayotajwa mahususi kwa ajili ya wanafunzi wenye ulemavu wa kuona (Visual impairment)?
questions.explanation: Kulingana na sehemu ya 2.1, mbinu mahususi kwa ulemavu wa kuona ni kutumia Braille, michoro ya juu ya hisia (tactile drawings), na sauti za kompyuta.

choices.content: Kutumia Braille na michoro ya juu ya hisia

questions.content: Mwanafunzi anayekabiliwa na changamoto mahususi za kuhesabu (hesabu) anaweza kuwa na aina gani ya ulemavu wa kujifunza (Learning Disabilities)?
questions.explanation: Sehemu ya 2.2 inaeleza kuwa Dyscalculia ni aina ya ulemavu wa kujifunza inayohusisha changamoto za hesabu, wakati Dyslexia ni kusoma na Dysgraphia ni kuandika.

questions.content: Kati ya tabia zifuatazo, ipi inahusishwa moja kwa moja na Conduct Disorders na sio ADHD?
questions.explanation: Kulingana na sehemu ya 2.3, ADHD inahusisha umakini, nguvu nyingi, na kuharibu mpangilio, huku Conduct Disorders zikihusisha tabia za kupinga sheria, vurugu, na kuwakosesa wengine haki.

choices.content: Tabia za kupinga sheria na vurugu

questions.content: Kwa ajili ya wanafunzi wenye changamoto za kiafya kama vile Epilepsy au Asthma, mwalimu anapaswa kutekeleza mkakati gani?
questions.explanation: Sehemu ya 2.4 inapendekeza kuwa kwa changamoto za afya, mwalimu anapaswa kutumia ratiba inayowezesha mapumziko au matibabu pamoja na ushirikiano na familia na madaktari.

choices.content: Kutumia ratiba inayowezesha mapumziko au matibabu
Kufundisha kwa kutumia michoro ya juu ya hisia
Kutoa mazoezi ya vitendo bila mapumziko

questions.content: Ni chombo gani kinachopendekezwa kusaidia wanafunzi wenye changamoto za mawasiliano wasioweza kutumia maneno vizuri (Non-verbal communication challenges)?
questions.explanation: Sehemu ya 2.5 inaeleza kuwa kwa changamoto za mawasiliano, hasa zisizo za maneno, mbinu zinazojumuisha mifumo ya picha au communication boards ni muhimu.

choices.content: Mifumo ya picha au communication boards

questions.content: Teknolojia ya msaada (Assistive Technology) ina maana gani?
questions.explanation: Kulingana na sehemu ya 8.1, teknolojia ya msaada ni vifaa vinavyosaidia mwanafunzi kufanya kazi ambazo vingekuwa vigumu bila msaada.

choices.content: Vifaa vinavyosaidia mwanafunzi kufanya kazi ambazo vingekuwa vigumu bila msaada
Vifaa tu vya kielektroniki vinavyotumika kompyuta
Vitabu na daftari pekee vinavyotumika shuleni
Vifaa vinavyotumika na walimu tu kufundisha

questions.content: Kati ya vifaa vifuatavyo, vina gani vinaundwa mahsusi kwa ajili ya wanafunzi wenye ulemavu wa kusikia?
questions.explanation: Sehemu ya 8.2 inaeleza kuwa Hearing aids, FM systems, na sound amplifiers ni vifaa vya msaada wa kusikia.

choices.content: Hearing aids, FM systems, na sound amplifiers

questions.content: Vifaa vifuatavyo vinafaa kwa ajili ya wanafunzi wenye changamoto za mawasiliano isipokuwa:
questions.explanation: Vitabu vya Braille ni vifaa vya msaada wa kuona (section 8.2, point 3), huku vingine ni vya mawasiliano (section 8.2, point 4).

questions.content: Ni faida gani kuu ya kutumia Michezo ya Elimu (Educational Games) darasani?
questions.explanation: Kulingana na sehemu ya 8.2, point 6, michezo ya elimu huongeza motisha, kushirikisha wanafunzi, na kufanya ujifunzaji kuwa wa kuvutia.

choices.content: Kuongeza motisha, kushirikisha wanafunzi, na kufanya ujifunzaji kuwa wa kuvutia

questions.content: Kulingana na vidokezo kwa walimu, teknolojia inapaswa kutumikaje?
questions.explanation: Sehemu ya 8.5 inaeleza kuwa teknolojia inapaswa kutumika kama nyenzo ya kusaidia, si mbadala wa kufundisha.

choices.content: Kama suluhisho la pekee la changamoto zote za darasa
Kama nyenzo ya kusaidia, si mbadala wa kufundisha
Bila kujali mahitaji ya kibinafsi ya mwanafunzi

questions.content: Alama ya 'STOP' ina maana gani kwa dereva?
questions.explanation: Alama ya 'STOP' inamaanisha kusimamisha gari kabisa, kuangalia kama kuna gari lingine, na kuendelea tu ikiwa ni salama.

choices.content: Kusimamisha gari kabisa na kuendelea baada ya kuwa salama

questions.content: Ni kitu gani cha kwanza cha kufanya kabla ya kuanza safari kulingana na moduli ya ukaguzi wa gari?
questions.explanation: Ni muhimu kukagua hali ya gari kama tairi, mafuta, na breki kabla ya kuanza safari kuhakikisha usalama.

choices.content: Kukagua hali ya gari (tairi, mafuta, breki)

questions.content: Kasi inayoruhusiwa katika maeneo ya jiji kwa kawaida ni kiasi gani?
questions.explanation: Katika maeneo ya jiji au makazi, kasi inayoruhusiwa kwa kawaida ni 50 km/h.

questions.content: Moja ya maadili ya dereva ni uvumilivu. Dereva anapaswa kufanya nini wakati anapokutana na dereva mwingine anayetaka kuingia barabarani?
questions.explanation: Dereva mwenye maadili anapaswa kuwa na uvumilivu na kumpa dereva mwingine haki ya njia.

questions.content: Kulingana na moduli, udereva ni zaidi ya kuendesha gari. Ni mchanganyiko gani wa sifa unaoelezewa kama muhimu kwa 'Dereva mzuri'?
questions.explanation: Kwenye kifungu cha 1 na 4, moduli inaelezea kuwa dereva mzuri ni yule anayefuata sheria na lazima awe makini, mwenye nidhamu na anayeheshimu watumiaji wengine wa barabara.

choices.content: Ujuzi wa kumudu mwendo tu na kushindana barabarani
U makini, nidhamu, na heshima kwa watumiaji wengine wa barabara
Ujuzi wa kurekebisha gari na kutumia barabara kwa kasi
Uvumilivu tu bila kufuata sheria za usalama

questions.content: Moduli inaorodhesha aina mbalimbali za watumiaji wa barabara. Ni wajibu gani maalum unaoelezewa kuwa Dereva anapaswa kuwa nalo dhidi ya hawa watumiaji wote?
questions.explanation: Kwenye kifungu cha 3 'Aina za Watumiaji wa Barabara', kuna tamko wazi la kuwa 'Dereva lazima awaheshimu wote'.

choices.content: Kupita wote kwa kasi ili kufika salama
Kutoa heshima kwa watumiaji wote wa barabara
Kutumia kengele kuwafukuza waendesha baiskeli na watembea kwa miguu

questions.content: Kabla ya kuanza safari, dereva anatakiwa kuhakikisha usalama wa gari. Ni orodha ipi ya vitu inayolingana na 'Vitu Muhimu Kabla ya Kuendesha' kama ilivyoorodheshwa kwenye moduli?
questions.explanation: Kifungu cha 6 'Vitu Muhimu Kabla ya Kuendesha' kinaorodhesha vitu vinavyohitaji kuhakikishwa: Breki, Tairi, Mafuta, Taa, na Mkanda wa usalama.

choices.content: Breki, tairi, mafuta, taa, na mkanda wa usalama
Mafuta, tairi, mwonekano wa gari, na hewa
Taa, breki, tairi, na kioo cha nyuma tu
Mkanda wa usalama, tairi, na mafuta pekee

questions.content: Kati ya yafuatayo, ni kitendo gani kinachotajwa mahususi kama 'Wajibu wa Dereva' wakati wa kuendesha?
questions.explanation: Kifungu cha 5 'Wajibu wa Dereva' kinaorodhesha vitendo maalum vya kufanya, ambapo 'Kutoa ishara kabla ya kugeuka' ni mojawapo, huku chaguo nyingine zikiwa ni 'Sifa za Dereva Bora' kutoka kifungu cha 4.

questions.content: Moduli inaelezea umuhimu wa kujifunza udereva. Ni matokeo gani makuu ya kujifunza udereva yanayotajwa yanayohusiana na usalama wa maisha?
questions.explanation: Kwenye kifungu cha 2 'Umuhimu wa Kujifunza Udereva', moduli inataja kuwa kujifunza kunasaidia kupunguza ajali barabarani na kulinda maisha ya watu wote.

choices.content: Kujua njia fupi za kufika ofisini
Kulinda maisha ya watu wote na kupunguza ajali
Kuweza kuendesha aina yoyote ya gari

questions.content: Which three components make up the Exposure Triangle in photography?
questions.explanation: The Exposure Triangle consists of ISO, Aperture, and Shutter Speed, which are the three main settings that determine the brightness and exposure of a photograph.

questions.content: What is the primary characteristic of a 'Prime' lens compared to a 'Zoom' lens?
questions.explanation: A prime lens has a fixed focal length, meaning it cannot zoom in or out, whereas a zoom lens covers a range of focal lengths.

choices.content: It has a variable focal length
It has a fixed focal length
It is always a wide-angle lens
It cannot be used for portrait photography

questions.content: Which composition technique involves dividing the image into a 3x3 grid to place subjects at intersections?
questions.explanation: The Rule of Thirds involves dividing the frame into nine equal parts using two horizontal and two vertical lines, suggesting placing important elements along those lines or at their intersections.

questions.content: In the context of lighting, what is the 'Golden Hour'?
questions.explanation: The Golden Hour is the period of daytime shortly after sunrise or before sunset, during which daylight is softer, redder, and warmer compared to when the sun is higher in the sky.

choices.content: The middle of the day when the sun is brightest
The period just after sunrise or just before sunset
The time when studio lights are set to maximum power
The hour immediately after sunset when the sky is blue

questions.content: Which file format is uncompressed and retains all image data from the sensor, making it ideal for post-production editing?
questions.explanation: RAW files are uncompressed and contain all the data captured by the camera's sensor, providing maximum flexibility for editing in software like Adobe Lightroom or Photoshop.

questions.content: Ni mbinu gani ya kukumbuka inayohusisha gawanya taarifa ndefu kuwa sehemu ndogo ndogo?

questions.content: What is the primary goal of Special Needs Education (SNE)?
questions.explanation: The module states that the goal of Special Needs Education is to ensure that all children have equal access to education, regardless of their abilities.

choices.content: To provide advanced education for gifted students only
To ensure all children have equal access to education regardless of abilities
To segregate children with disabilities into separate institutions
To focus exclusively on medical treatment for disabilities

questions.content: Which statement best describes the difference between Special Education and Inclusive Education?
questions.explanation: The content defines Special Education as separate schools or programs for children with disabilities, whereas Inclusive Education involves integrating children with disabilities into mainstream classrooms with appropriate support.

choices.content: Special Education is for gifted students, while Inclusive Education is for students with disabilities

choices.content: In the social and environmental barriers
In the lack of government funding

questions.content: What is the proposed solution under the Social Model of disability?

choices.content: To provide medical treatment to cure the disability
To adapt the environment, curriculum, and society to allow full participation
To separate children with disabilities from mainstream schools

questions.content: Based on Vygotsky’s Sociocultural Theory, how can a teacher best support a child within their Zone of Proximal Development (ZPD)?
questions.explanation: Vygotsky's ZPD refers to the difference between what a learner can do without help and what they can do with guidance. The module suggests using peer tutoring and scaffolding to support children in this zone.

choices.content: By assigning tasks the child can complete independently without assistance to build confidence.
By providing peer tutoring and scaffolding for tasks just beyond the child's independent ability.
By focusing solely on abstract reasoning exercises regardless of the child's current developmental stage.
By using strict reinforcement to correct every error immediately until the task is mastered.

questions.content: According to the section on Physical Development, how should a teacher adapt instruction for a visually impaired child learning about shapes and letters?
questions.explanation: The module notes that sensory impairments affect interaction with the environment and explicitly states that a visually impaired child may rely on tactile materials for learning shapes and letters.

choices.content: By providing audio resources exclusively to describe the visual concepts.
By relying on the child's observation of peers to learn through imitation.
By utilizing tactile materials that allow the child to feel the shapes and letters.
By using standard print materials to encourage the child to maximize their remaining vision.

questions.content: The module suggests using multisensory reading programs combining visual and auditory methods for a child with dyslexia. This approach aligns best with which learning theory application?
questions.explanation: The module lists Multiple Intelligences (Gardner) as a strategy that uses different teaching methods—visual, auditory, kinesthetic—to cater to diverse learners, specifically citing multisensory programs for dyslexia.

choices.content: Behaviorism, which focuses on reinforcement to encourage desired behaviors.
Humanistic Theory, which prioritizes self-esteem and emotional well-being.
Multiple Intelligences, which suggests using different teaching methods like visual and auditory to cater to diverse learners.
Information Processing Theory, which focuses solely on how children store and retrieve information.

questions.content: In the context of Social Development, which teaching strategy is recommended to help a child with autism understand behavior expectations and social norms?
questions.explanation: The module notes that children with autism may struggle with social cues and recommends using social stories to explain behavior expectations as a specific teaching tip.

choices.content: Unstructured free play to encourage natural interaction with peers.
Social stories that explicitly explain behavior expectations.
Competitive games to force social engagement and turn-taking.
Verbal reprimands to correct missed social cues immediately.

questions.content: A child with a behavioral disorder is having difficulty managing emotions in the classroom. Based on the Emotional Development section, which strategy should the teacher employ?
questions.explanation: The module states that children with behavioral disorders may have difficulty managing emotions and suggests teaching emotion regulation techniques like deep breathing and verbal expression as a key strategy.

choices.content: Strict isolation until the child calms down naturally.
Teaching specific emotion regulation techniques such as deep breathing or verbal expression.
Reducing academic expectations to lower stress levels and prevent frustration.
Focusing solely on positive reinforcement without addressing the emotion itself.

questions.content: What is the primary distinction between screening and diagnostic assessment in the context of Special Needs Education?
questions.explanation: According to the module, screening is defined as a 'quick check to detect children who may be at risk,' whereas assessment is a 'more in-depth evaluation after screening to confirm the presence and type of disability.'

choices.content: Screening is a comprehensive evaluation used to design IEPs, while diagnostic assessment is a quick check for risk.
Screening is a quick check to detect children who may be at risk, while diagnostic assessment is an in-depth evaluation to confirm the presence and type of disability.
Screening is conducted only by medical doctors, while diagnostic assessment is performed exclusively by classroom teachers.
Screening focuses on emotional development only, while diagnostic assessment focuses solely on physical impairments.

questions.content: Why is a multidisciplinary approach emphasized for diagnostic procedures in Special Needs Education?
questions.explanation: The module states that diagnostic procedures are conducted by multidisciplinary teams and highlights the teaching tip that 'no single professional can fully diagnose all disabilities.'

choices.content: To ensure that the cost of assessment is distributed across different departments.
Because standardized tests are unreliable and require multiple perspectives to be valid.
To allow teachers to avoid the responsibility of diagnosing students themselves.

choices.content: Administering the Wechsler Intelligence Scale for Children (WISC).
Using the Denver Developmental Screening Test (DDST).
Immediately preparing an Individualized Education Program (IEP).

choices.content: Standardized tests that compare a child's performance to age norms.
The Wechsler Intelligence Scale for Children (WISC).
Curriculum-based tests to evaluate learning gaps.
Interviews with parents, teachers, and caregivers.

questions.content: According to the module, what is a potential negative consequence of delayed identification of special needs, such as dyslexia?
questions.explanation: Section 5 of the module explicitly states that delayed identification can lead to 'widening learning gaps and low self-esteem,' contrasting with the benefits of early identification.

choices.content: The child will automatically be placed in a separate school.
It can lead to widening learning gaps and low self-esteem.
The child will require less support from teachers in the long run.
It allows the child to develop coping mechanisms without professional interference.

questions.content: According to Article 24 of the UN Convention on the Rights of Persons with Disabilities (CRPD), what is the fundamental requirement regarding the educational setting for children with disabilities?

choices.content: The right to segregated education based on the type of disability.

quizzes.course_title: 📘 KOZI: WhatsApp Machine (Automatic Selling System)
quizzes.title: 📱 MODULE 1: WHATSAPP BUSINESS MARKETING Mastery Check
quizzes.description: AI-generated assessment based on this module's content. Score 70% or higher to unlock the next module.

questions.content: WhatsApp Business ni app maalum inayokuwezesha kufanya nini?
questions.explanation: Maelezo yanasema WhatsApp Business inakuwezesha kuuza bidhaa, kuwasiliana na wateja, na kuonyesha bidhaa zako (catalog).

choices.content: Kuuza bidhaa, kuwasiliana na wateja, na kuonyesha catalog

questions.content: Kipi kati ya hizi kipo kwenye WhatsApp Business lakini hakipo kwenye WhatsApp ya Kawaida?
questions.explanation: WhatsApp ya Kawaida haipati catalog, lakini WhatsApp Business ina 'Catalog ya bidhaa'.

questions.content: Kulingana na moduli, wateja huamini zaidi biashara yenye WhatsApp Business kuliko nini?
questions.explanation: Strong point inayotajwa ni: 'Wateja huamini zaidi biashara yenye WhatsApp Business kuliko page'.

questions.content: Ni sifa gani ya WhatsApp Business inayohusiana na majibu ya haraka?
questions.explanation: Orodha ya sifa za WhatsApp Business inajumuisha 'Quick replies'.

quizzes.course_title: 📘 KOZI: WhatsApp Machine (Automatic Selling System)
quizzes.title: 🏪 MODULE 2: WHATSAPP CATALOG & PRODUCT MANAGEMENT Mastery Check
quizzes.description: AI-generated assessment based on this module's content. Score 70% or higher to unlock the next module.

questions.content: According to the module, what is the primary benefit of organizing products into specific categories (e.g., Clothes, Electronics) within the WhatsApp Catalog?
questions.explanation: The module states under 'KUPANGA BIDHAA KWA CATEGORIES' that a good arrangement (Mpangilio mzuri) makes the shop look big and professional, leading customers to trust it faster.

choices.content: It automatically increases the price of the products to generate more profit.
It makes the shop appear larger and more professional, which helps build customer trust quickly.
It allows the business owner to send automated marketing messages to specific groups.
It eliminates the need for writing product descriptions or taking photos.

questions.content: Which formula is provided in the module for calculating the correct selling price to ensure a sustainable business strategy?
questions.explanation: The section 'KUPANGA BEI & PROFIT STRATEGY' explicitly provides the formula: 'Bei ya kuuza = Gharama + Usafiri + Faida + Risk'.

choices.content: Selling Price = Cost + Shipping + Profit + Risk
Selling Price = Cost + Emotion + Market Trend

questions.content: Why is a well-written product description referred to as a 'silent salesman' in this module?
questions.explanation: The module contrasts a bad description with a good one that includes details like material, durability, size, and delivery speed, noting that the description acts as a 'silent salesman'.

choices.content: Because it answers customer questions and highlights benefits (like durability and delivery) without you needing to be there.
Because it uses audio notes to speak to the customer automatically.
Because it replaces the need for a physical sales team entirely.
Because it is written in a language that only the business owner understands.

questions.content: What are the specific rules mentioned in the module regarding the images used for products in the catalog?
questions.explanation: Under 'RULE YA PICHA ZA BIDHAA', the module lists three rules: Background iwe safi (clean), Picha 2–3 kwa bidhaa (2-3 photos), and Mwanga wa kutosha (sufficient lighting).

choices.content: Use a dark background to make colors pop and only use one photo to save space.
Use filters to hide defects and use as many photos as possible.
Ensure a clean background, use 2-3 photos per product, and ensure there is sufficient lighting.
Use screenshots from other websites and avoid using real product photos.

questions.content: How does the module define the WhatsApp Catalog in the context of a business strategy?
questions.explanation: The module defines WhatsApp Catalog as 'sehemu ya WhatsApp Business inayokuwezesha kuweka bidhaa zako moja kwa moja ndani ya app' and emphasizes it is like a 'mini online shop'.

choices.content: It is a tool for sending bulk spam messages to potential clients.
It is a mini online shop located directly inside the WhatsApp Business app.
It is a separate website that requires a monthly subscription fee.
It is a payment gateway for processing credit card transactions.

quizzes.course_title: 📘 KOZI: WhatsApp Machine (Automatic Selling System)
quizzes.title: 📢 MODULE 3: WHATSAPP MARKETING & CUSTOMER ACQUISITION Mastery Check
quizzes.description: AI-generated assessment based on this module's content. Score 70% or higher to unlock the next module.

questions.content: According to the module, which combination of WhatsApp Status types creates a comprehensive marketing strategy that builds trust and urgency simultaneously?
questions.explanation: The module outlines three specific types of business statuses: Product Showcase (to display items), Offer/Promotion (to create FOMO), and Social Proof (to build trust). Using all three creates a balanced strategy.

choices.content: Product Showcase, Personal Life Updates, and Greetings
Product Showcase, Offer/Promotion, and Social Proof
Only Offer/Promotion statuses to maximize immediate sales
Social Proof and Customer Complaints to show transparency

questions.content: What distinguishes a high-converting caption from a poor one based on the 'Captions Zinazozalisha Mateja' section?
questions.explanation: The module contrasts a bad caption ('Viatu vipo kwa bei nzuri') with a good one. A good caption is defined by having Attention (🔥), Emotion (urgency), and Action (DM sasa).

choices.content: A good caption focuses solely on the low price of the product.
A good caption uses complex language to sound professional.
A good caption incorporates Attention, Emotion, and a clear Call to Action (DM sasa).
A good caption is short and does not include emojis.

questions.content: Why is the WhatsApp Broadcast List referred to as a 'silent sales weapon' in this module?
questions.explanation: The module states that the Broadcast List is a 'silent sales weapon' because it enables sending messages to many people without being in a group, and customers do not know if others received the same message.

choices.content: It sends messages automatically without the business owner needing to write them.
It allows you to send messages to many people at once without them knowing that others received the same message.
It is the only way to send messages to people who are not saved in your contacts.
It ensures that every recipient replies immediately to confirm receipt.

questions.content: In the 'Customer Flow' system described, what is the primary long-term goal beyond making a single sale?
questions.explanation: The module explicitly states: 'Lengo si kuuza mara moja, Lengo ni kuunda wateja wanaorudi kila siku' (The goal is not to sell once, the goal is to create customers who return every day).

choices.content: To get the customer to join a WhatsApp Group chat.
To create a repeat customer who returns every day.
To collect the customer's data for a third-party database.
To ensure the customer pays the highest possible price.

questions.content: How does the 'Social Proof' status type specifically contribute to the WhatsApp marketing strategy?
questions.explanation: The module identifies Social Proof as 'Uaminifu wa Wateja' (Customer Trust). The example given is a status confirming a customer has received their order, which validates the business's reliability.

choices.content: It creates Fear Of Missing Out (FOMO) by showing limited time offers.
It builds customer trust (Uaminifu) by showing evidence that others have bought and received products.
It displays the technical specifications of the product in detail.
It allows the business to announce price increases.

quizzes.course_title: 📘 KOZI: WhatsApp Machine (Automatic Selling System)
quizzes.title: ⚡ MODULE 4: QUICK REPLIES & SALES AUTOMATION Mastery Check
quizzes.description: AI-generated assessment based on this module's content. Score 70% or higher to unlock the next module.

questions.content: What is the primary analogy used in the module to describe the function of Quick Replies?
questions.explanation: The module states that Quick Replies are like having a sales assistant (muuza bidhaa) inside your WhatsApp 24/7 because they allow you to send pre-made responses instantly.

questions.content: According to the 'Strong Point' in Section 2, what is the direct correlation between response speed and business results?
questions.explanation: The module explicitly lists 'Kasi ya majibu = kasi ya pesa' (Speed of reply = speed of money) as a key strong point for using Quick Replies.

choices.content: Speed of reply equals speed of money
Slow replies build more trust with customers
Speed of reply determines the delivery location
Fast replies reduce the professional image of the business

questions.content: In the 'Flow ya Biashara' example provided, which shortcut should be used immediately after a customer says 'Naagiza' (I order)?
questions.explanation: The module demonstrates a specific flow: Mteja: 'Naagiza' -> Wewe: /order. This shortcut prompts the customer for their name and location to complete the order.

questions.content: How does the module differentiate 'Business Hack' (Advanced Automation) replies from standard Quick Replies?
questions.explanation: The module explains that advanced replies like 'Stock inakaribia kuisha' (Stock is running out) are not just answers, but 'tools za kufunga mauzo' (tools to close sales).

choices.content: They are used to provide location details
They are used to thank the customer after a sale
They act as tools to close sales by creating urgency
They are used to explain delivery times

questions.content: Which specific sequence of steps is required to set up a new Quick Reply in WhatsApp Business according to the module?
questions.explanation: The module outlines the setup steps as: Nenda WhatsApp Business -> Settings -> Business Tools -> Chagua 'Quick Replies' -> Bonyeza 'Add New'.

choices.content: Settings -> Business Tools -> Quick Replies -> Add New
Business Tools -> Settings -> Add New -> Quick Replies
Settings -> Account -> Business Tools -> Quick Replies

quizzes.course_title: 📘 KOZI: WhatsApp Machine (Automatic Selling System)
quizzes.module_title: 🧠 MODULE 5: SALES PSYCHOLOGY & AUTO MESSAGING SYSTEM
quizzes.title: 🧠 MODULE 5: SALES PSYCHOLOGY & AUTO MESSAGING SYSTEM Mastery Check
quizzes.description: AI-generated assessment based on this module's content. Score 70% or higher to unlock the next module.

questions.content: According to the module, what is the fundamental distinction between effective auto messaging and simply sending a high volume of messages?
questions.explanation: The module explicitly states that 'Auto messaging si kutuma messages nyingi — ni kutuma message sahihi kwa muda sahihi' and notes that customers are persuaded by emotion and timing, not volume.

choices.content: Effective auto messaging requires expensive software to bypass spam filters.
It is about sending the right message at the right time, rather than just sending many messages.
Auto messaging is only effective if you send messages to every contact in your database simultaneously.
The main goal of auto messaging is to annoy the customer until they respond.

questions.content: Which of the following examples best illustrates the psychological trigger of 'Scarcity' as opposed to 'Urgency'?
questions.explanation: The module defines Scarcity (Upungufu) as emphasizing that 'Bidhaa ni chache' (items are few), using the example 'Zimebaki 3 tu', whereas Urgency focuses on time limits.

choices.content: "Hii deal ya leo ni ya kipekee."

questions.content: How does the 'Social Proof' trigger function to influence customer behavior in the WhatsApp sales system?
questions.explanation: The module describes Social Proof as 'Wengine wananunua' (Others are buying), with the example 'Wateja 10 wamenunua leo hii', to validate the purchase decision.

choices.content: It creates a fear of missing out (FOMO) by highlighting limited time slots.
It persuades the customer by showing that other people have already purchased the product.
It forces the customer to make a decision by threatening to withdraw the offer.
It appeals to the customer's emotions by offering a unique, one-time deal.

questions.content: What is the recommended approach for following up with customers to avoid being annoying?
questions.explanation: The module contrasts annoying mistakes with the correct approach, stating that 'Kufuatilia ni kusaidia — si kusumbua' (Following up is helping — not bothering) and suggests offering assistance or options.

choices.content: Repeatedly ask 'Umenunua?' until they give a definitive answer.
Send the same offer message every hour to ensure they see it.
Focus on helping the customer, such as offering to help choose options or reminding them of expiring offers.
Immediately stop all communication if they do not buy within the first hour.

questions.content: According to the Sales Timing System, what type of message is most effective to send in the evening (Jioni)?
questions.explanation: The module outlines the daily structure as: 'Asubuhi → curiosity posts', 'Mchana → offers', and 'Jioni → urgency (last chance)'.

choices.content: Curiosity posts to build interest for the next day.
Educational content about how the product works.

quizzes.course_title: 📘 KOZI: WhatsApp Machine (Automatic Selling System)
quizzes.module_title: 📢 MODULE 6: WHATSAPP STATUS MARKETING (DAILY SALES MACHINE)
quizzes.title: 📢 MODULE 6: WHATSAPP STATUS MARKETING (DAILY SALES MACHINE) Mastery Check
quizzes.description: AI-generated assessment based on this module's content. Score 70% or higher to unlock the next module.

questions.content: What is the primary business function of WhatsApp Status according to the module?
questions.explanation: The module states that WhatsApp Status is not just life pictures but a 'free advertising billboard ya biashara yako'.

choices.content: A place to share personal life photos
A free advertising billboard for your business
A storage space for product files

questions.content: What are the three main jobs of a status in the marketing system?
questions.explanation: The module lists the three jobs of status as Attention (Kuvuta macho), Interest (Maelezo mafupi), and Action ('DM sasa').

questions.content: Which type of status is described as generating the most DMs?
questions.explanation: The module explicitly states, 'Curiosity ndiyo status inayozalisha DM nyingi zaidi'.

questions.content: According to the timing strategy, what type of status is recommended for the morning (7–10)?
questions.explanation: The schedule indicates 'Asubuhi (7–10) → Curiosity'.

questions.content: What is the formula for a status that sells?
questions.explanation: The module lists the formula as 'Hook + Value + Urgency + CTA'.

quizzes.course_title: 📘 KOZI: WhatsApp Machine (Automatic Selling System)
quizzes.module_title: 📢 MODULE 7: BROADCAST LIST & CUSTOMER RETENTION SYSTEM
quizzes.title: 📢 MODULE 7: BROADCAST LIST & CUSTOMER RETENTION SYSTEM Mastery Check
quizzes.description: AI-generated assessment based on this module's content. Score 70% or higher to unlock the next module.

questions.content: According to the module, how does a recipient perceive a message sent via a Broadcast List compared to a Group?
questions.explanation: The module defines a Broadcast List as a system enabling one message to many, appearing as a private message ('kama ujumbe wa binafsi'), unlike a Group where everyone sees everything.

choices.content: As a public announcement visible to all other recipients
As a direct, private message (DM) written specifically for them
As a mass marketing email that often goes to spam
As a notification that they have been added to a new group chat

questions.content: Why is the Broadcast system considered crucial for building a stable business according to the module?
questions.explanation: The module contrasts 'Bila Broadcast' (hunting for new customers, unstable sales) with 'Na Broadcast' (selling to those who bought, repeat sales, stable business).

choices.content: It automates the process of finding completely new customers every single day
It allows you to ignore existing customers and focus solely on VIPs
It enables repeat sales to existing customers rather than relying only on unstable new customer acquisition
It guarantees that every message sent will result in an immediate sale

questions.content: Which messaging strategy is most effective for the 'VIP Customers' segment based on the module guidelines?
questions.explanation: The module categorizes VIP customers as those who buy frequently and recommends sending them 'exclusive deals + early access' to make them feel special.

choices.content: Sending educational content to build trust because they haven't bought yet
Sending general welcome messages with a catalog link
Providing exclusive deals and early access to new products
Sending repetitive messages every hour to ensure they see the offer

questions.content: What is the primary strategic advantage of retargeting previous customers over acquiring new ones?
questions.explanation: The module states under Retargeting that 'Mteja wa zamani ni rahisi kumuuza kuliko mpya' (A former customer is easier to sell to than a new one).

choices.content: Previous customers require more trust-building education than new ones
It is generally easier to sell to a former customer than to acquire a completely new one
New customers are more likely to accept upgrade offers immediately
Retargeting requires sending messages every hour to stay top of mind

questions.content: To avoid being perceived as spam and maintain a 'VIP service' standard, what is the recommended frequency for sending Broadcast messages?
questions.explanation: The module advises against sending messages every hour or repeating them without value. The correct approach is sending 2–3 times a week with value or offers, treating the broadcast as a VIP service rather than noise.

choices.content: Every hour to ensure maximum visibility
Once a month to avoid bothering the client
2–3 times per week while providing value or offers
Only when a new customer joins the list

quizzes.course_title: 📘 KOZI: WhatsApp Machine (Automatic Selling System)
quizzes.title: 📊 MODULE 8: WHATSAPP SALES FUNNEL SYSTEM Mastery Check
quizzes.description: AI-generated assessment based on this module's content. Score 70% or higher to unlock the next module.

questions.content: In the WhatsApp Sales Funnel Core Flow, which step immediately follows 'Status (Attention)' and what is its primary objective?
questions.explanation: According to the Core Flow, Step 1 is Status (Attention) and Step 2 is DM (Interest). The specific goal listed for the DM step is 'mazungumzo' (conversation).

questions.content: According to the 'Funnel Psychology' section, what is the correct sequence of principles that leads to a purchase, and what generates the 'secret profit'?
questions.explanation: The module lists the principles in order: 👀 Attention kwanza, 🧠 Trust pili, ❤️ Emotion husababisha kununua, and 🔁 Follow-up = profit ya siri.

questions.content: How does the 'Daily Sales Machine Flow' differentiate a business with a funnel from one without, according to the module?
questions.explanation: The module states: 'Bila funnel = mauzo ya kubahatisha' (guessing) and 'Na funnel = mauzo ya mfumo (predictable income)'. The cycle repeating daily creates 'income stable'.

choices.content: Without a funnel, sales are predictable; with a funnel, sales are based on luck.
Without a funnel, sales are based on guessing; with a funnel, sales are a system (predictable income).
Without a funnel, you have repeat sales; with a funnel, you only get new customers.
Without a funnel, you use DMs; with a funnel, you only use Status.

questions.content: In the provided 'Mfano wa Funnel Halisi' (Real Funnel Example), the statement 'Zimebaki 3 tu — unaweza order sasa' represents which step of the funnel and what psychological trigger does it utilize?
questions.explanation: The example shows 'Zimebaki 3 tu' (Only 3 left) under the Closing step. The module lists 'Scarcity' and 'Urgency' as the components of Step 4 (Closing).

questions.content: According to the section 'Why Funnel Increases Sales,' what is a key structural advantage of using a funnel system regarding customer management?
questions.explanation: Under 'Why Funnel Increases Sales,' the benefits listed include 'Hakuna kupoteza wateja' (No losing customers) and 'Kila hatua ina kazi yake' (Every step has its job).

choices.content: It ensures you never have to talk to customers directly.
It guarantees that every customer buys immediately without follow-up.
It prevents losing customers because every step has a specific job.
It allows you to ignore the 'Status' step and focus only on 'Closing'.
